catan.name: 5-6 Player Extension
catan.description: Allows up to 6 players to settle Catan with additional components.

catan.name: Seafarers
catan.description: Adds exploration on the high seas with ships, gold fields, and pirate islands.

catan.name: Cities & Knights
catan.description: Introduces city improvements, knights, barbarian invasions, and new development cards.

ticket-to-ride.name: Europe
ticket-to-ride.description: New map featuring European cities, tunnels, ferries, and train stations.
Adds larger cards and new destination tickets for the USA map.

wingspan.name: European Expansion
wingspan.description: Introduces 81 new bird cards featuring European species and new bonus cards.

wingspan.name: Oceania Expansion
wingspan.description: Adds 95 Oceania birds, new nectar resource, and a new end-of-round goal system.

carcassonne.name: Inns & Cathedrals
carcassonne.description: Adds sixth player pieces, inns for roads, and cathedrals for cities.

carcassonne.name: Traders & Builders
carcassonne.description: Introduces builder and pig pieces, plus trade goods tokens for economic strategy.

dominion.name: Intrigue
dominion.description: Adds 26 new Kingdom cards with choice-based actions and Victory-Action hybrid cards.

dominion.name: Seaside
dominion.description: Introduces Duration cards that affect multiple turns and maritime-themed mechanics.

pandemic.name: On the Brink
pandemic.description: Adds 5th player, new roles, Virulent Strain challenge, and Bio-Terrorist mode.

pandemic.name: In the Lab
pandemic.description: Introduces lab boards for researching cures through sequence challenges.

spirit-island.name: Branch & Claw
spirit-island.description: Adds two new spirits, event cards, and token event mechanics for more variety.

spirit-island.name: Jagged Earth
spirit-island.description: Massive expansion with 10 new spirits, new adversary, and badlands tokens.

root.name: The Riverfolk Expansion
root.description: Adds Riverfolk and Lizard Cult factions, plus second Vagabond for 6 players.

root.name: The Underworld Expansion
root.description: Introduces Underground Duchy and Corvid Conspiracy factions with unique mechanics.

scythe.name: Invaders from Afar
scythe.description: Adds two new factions (Albion and Togawa) for up to 7 players.

scythe.name: The Wind Gambit
scythe.description: Introduces airships with unique abilities and alternative resolution tiles.

king-of-tokyo.name: Power Up!
king-of-tokyo.description: Adds unique evolution cards for each monster, giving them special abilities.

king-of-tokyo.name: Halloween
king-of-tokyo.description: Introduces two new monsters and Halloween-themed costume cards.

azul.name: Stained Glass of Sintra
azul.description: Standalone expansion with transparent panes and new scoring mechanisms.

azul.name: Summer Pavilion
azul.description: Standalone with wild tiles and new color-matching scoring patterns.

splendor.name: Cities of Splendor
splendor.description: Four expansions in one: Cities, Trading Posts, Orient, and Strongholds.

seven-wonders.name: Leaders
seven-wonders.description: Adds 36 leader cards that provide unique abilities throughout the game.

seven-wonders.name: Cities
seven-wonders.description: Introduces city cards, diplomacy, and team play options.

seven-wonders.name: Armada
seven-wonders.description: Adds naval warfare and exploration mechanics with ship tokens.

terraforming-mars.name: Prelude
terraforming-mars.description: Adds Prelude cards for faster starts and new corporations.

terraforming-mars.name: Colonies
terraforming-mars.description: Introduces colony tiles on other worlds and new trade mechanics.

terraforming-mars.name: Venus Next
terraforming-mars.description: Adds Venus board, new tags, and terraforming objectives for Venus.

betrayal-at-house-on-the-hill.name: Widow's Walk
betrayal-at-house-on-the-hill.description: Adds roof tiles, 20 new haunts, and new room mechanics.

lords-of-waterdeep.name: Scoundrels of Skullport
lords-of-waterdeep.description: Adds Undermountain and Skullport modules with corruption mechanic and 6th player.

cosmic-encounter.name: Cosmic Incursion
cosmic-encounter.description: Adds 20 new aliens, rewards deck, and support for 6th player.

cosmic-encounter.name: Cosmic Conflict
cosmic-encounter.description: Introduces 20 more aliens, hazard deck, and 7th player components.

clank.name: Sunken Treasures
clank.description: Adds underwater SCUBA track and flooded tunnels to explore.

clank.name: The Mummy's Curse
clank.description: Egyptian-themed expansion with curses, market, and new mechanisms.

quacks-of-quedlinburg.name: The Herb Witches
quacks-of-quedlinburg.description: Adds 5th player, witch ingredient, and new ingredient books.

quacks-of-quedlinburg.name: The Alchemists
quacks-of-quedlinburg.description: Introduces three new ingredient sets with unique mechanics.

power-grid.name: Benelux/Central Europe
power-grid.description: Double-sided board with Belgium, Netherlands, Luxembourg, and Central Europe maps.

power-grid.name: France/Italy
power-grid.description: New maps with unique power plant markets and regional mechanics.

villainous.name: Wicked to the Core
villainous.description: Adds Evil Queen, Hades, and Dr. Facilier with unique villain decks.

villainous.name: Perfectly Wretched
villainous.description: Introduces Cruella De Vil, Mother Gothel, and Pete as playable villains.

brass-birmingham.name: Iron Clays
brass-birmingham.description: Premium poker chip set designed for use with Brass games.

sagrada.name: The Great Facades - Passion
sagrada.description: Adds Passion module with inspiration cards and rare glass dice.

sagrada.name: The Great Facades - Life
sagrada.description: Introduces Life module with new window patterns and mechanics.

dixit.name: Dixit: Odyssey
dixit.description: Standalone expansion supporting up to 12 players with 84 new cards.

dixit.name: Dixit: Harmonies
dixit.description: Adds 84 new beautifully illustrated cards by Paul Echegoyen.

agricola.name: Farmers of the Moor
agricola.description: Adds heating, horses, and moor/forest expansion mechanics.

agricola.name: All Creatures Big and Small: Even More Buildings Big and Small
agricola.description: Expansion pack with new buildings for the 2-player version.

concordia.name: Salsa
concordia.description: Adds salt resource, forum tiles, and new maps for varied gameplay.

concordia.name: Britannia/Germania
concordia.description: Double-sided map featuring Britain and Germania regions.

great-western-trail.name: Rails to the North
great-western-trail.description: Adds northern expansion with new buildings, objectives, and mechanics.

castles-of-burgundy.name: New Player Boards
castles-of-burgundy.description: Collection of alternative estate boards for increased variety.

everdell.name: Pearlbrook
everdell.description: Introduces underwater realm with pearls, wonders, and new critter cards.

everdell.name: Spirecrest
everdell.description: Adds weather cards, big critters, and mountain board expansion.
